selected_candidate: Refactor Atlas prompt packet construction through an internal rollup-aware helper and validate Feature Depth recommendations before packet emission.
rejected_candidates: Only validate Feature Depth in production readiness; rejected because callers could still emit shallow packets outside readiness.
Raise the default recommendation count globally; rejected because the missing gate was at prompt packet emission.
Route to Blueprint for new requirements; rejected because the existing requirement is clear and implementation-bounded.
decision_basis: Final prompts must not be generated from shallow recommendation output, because that is a direct cause of short continuation batches.
